# kSecEncryptionMode

**Global Variable**

The encryption mode.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecEncryptionMode: CFString
```

## Discussion

If you do not supply this key, an appropriate value will be supplied for you. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/transform-attributes#Encryption-Modes] for a list of possible values.
title: kSecEncryptionMode
